body_txt:
Simply put, a character isn't wearing underwear for some reason. According to The Other Wiki , "'Going commando' is reputed to have begun with commando and other special forces military units, in which some soldiers stopped wearing underwear to prevent chafing." Although the term "going commando" in general usage means no under pants , this trope is wider than that and includes persons not wearing the kind of undergarments that are or were expected in their society and period. In particular, this includes women going braless. When a male does it, it's generally played for humor , squick , arousal , or it happened because he's a Man in a Kilt (see that page). When a female does it , now it's for arousal most of the time, but could still be Played for Laughs . In Speculative Fiction or other works decribing people from cultures radically different from ours, the trope can
also be used to show just how different that other culture is, or possibly that it's more "primitive". Lack of underwear may also be averted or lampshaded in the case of a Half-Dressed Cartoon Animal of either sex. If the outerwear is designed to show off the obvious lack of underwear (due to strategic cut-outs, slits or transparent material), that's Vapor Wear . Compare Naked in Mink , Diamonds in the Buff , Full-Frontal Assault (for when the fighter decides to forgo more than his boxers). Other names for Going Commando can be identically separate in these variations as well, e.g. "Free(-)balling" is for Males and "Free(-)buffing" is for Females.
